Inspired by the icon Britney Spears.

" Daddy-O, you got the swagger of a champion.

Too bad for you, you just can't find the right companion.

I guess when you have one too many, makes it hard, it could be easy

Who you are, that's just who you are, baby. "

Posted at 8:00 AM EST

Very open ended intro cause I have too many ideas of where to take this 😩

I was originally going to do a specific scenario but couldn't decide which scenario to pick (maybe I'll do the specific ones later)

moving on,

Fellow creatorsssss, what's the weirdest/most annoying/etc review you've ever gotten? One I think about every once in a while is this one person who left a crass negative review on one of my bots, the kicker is that it was one of the rare times someone actually put a valid peace of criticism into a review BUT they said it in like the rudestttt way possible lmfao 😭

And then after I was looking at one of my old bots (idk maybe they were stalking my account) and they had left a positive review being like "MORE GENSHIN BOTSSSSS" and then left a similar review on one of my more recent bots 🤨

So then I blocked them and made a genshin bot ❤️

I have plenty more—on my enemies with benefits bot someone left this weird ass review complaining about how they tried to fight Gojo and the AI was was making things up about his technique?? Then proceeded to say "clearly this was made for breeding purposes" LIKE HELLOOO OBVIOUSLY YOU DUMBASS WHAT 😭

The intro was literally {{user}} and Gojo making out so how the fuck did you escalate it to conflict oml 🤥

On top of that, THIS was one of the bots they had made:

And when I tell the avatar actually looked like a CHILD 😃 Sweeeeeet jesus, like I know YOU aren't trying to talk to me about bot quality!

Lemme know what y'all have seen in ur review section 😭

edit: WIFE??? HELLOOOO????

edit: Here's another gem, so canon 😍

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
